CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-18-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire; CSR: Lavon Granger, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Appearances:
Diana Tweedy, Esq. for Plaintiff Kelly Yudin, guardian ad litem for Nicolai Yudin a minor and Ekatrina Yudin, a minor.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Compromise:
Reimbursement of legal/Costs to attorney: $1,227.74
A net balance of $8,772.26 will be deposited in a Bank of America Savings account and used to pay for claimant's private school.
Order signed in open court.
